observation: WOOFi reports the sPMM exploit began at 15:49 UTC on Arbitrum.
The exploiter borrowed about 7.7M WOO plus other assets before selling WOO into WOOFi.
WOOFi attributed feasibility to low WOO liquidity on Arbitrum and the addition of a WOO lending market.
WOOFi reported its sPMM adjusted WOO to an extreme value near zero, around 0.00000009 dollars.
The normal Chainlink fallback check did not cover the WOO token price.
The attacker repeated the attack three times within a short period.
WOOFi reported about 8.75M dollars in profit after flash loans were repaid.
WOOFi reported large swaps were detected and WOOFi Swap contracts were paused by 16:02 UTC.
WOOFi extended a 10 percent whitehat bounty to the exploiter and placed an Arkham bounty for additional information.
